title: Meatless Melt American Ricotta Casserole
description: A malty, molten meal-prep American dish featuring ricotta, marinara, and melted mozzarella cheese, suitable for diabetes-friendly diets and can be made in under an hour. This recipe serves 4-6 people and has a medium level of difficulty.
instructions: In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the garlic powder and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the marina sauce and bring to a simmer.
Stir in the ricotta cheese and cook until heated through.
Transfer the ricotta mixture to a 9x13-inch baking dish.
Sprinkle the mozzarella cheese over the top of the ricotta mixture.
Sprinkle the breadcrumbs over the mozzarella cheese.
Mix the egg beaters and parmesan cheese in a small bowl.
Spread the breadcrumb mixture evenly over the top of the casserole.
Top with panko-style breadcrumbs and drizzle with olive oil.
Bake in the preheated oven for 25 minutes, or until golden brown.
Let the casserole rest for 5 minutes before serving.
